body:
## Documentation Gap **Package:** `@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-mgmt` **Service directory:** `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/` **Triggered by:** f3b95de (PR #58358) and 1b85421 (PR #57924) by @ArcturusZhang ## What Changed Two PRs merged to `main` on 2026-04-23 each introduced new documentation files for the Azure Management Generator emitter package: 1. **PR #57924** added `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/docs/client-options.md` ‚Äî full reference for the `@@clientOption` decorator keys recognized by the emitter (`resource-rbac-roles` and the newly added `resource-name-constraint`). 2. **PR #58358** added `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/eng/scripts/Get-ResourceHierarchy.ps1` and its companion `Get-ResourceHierarchy.md` ‚Äî a reflection-based analyzer that extracts the resource hierarchy from a compiled management-plane DLL and outputs JSON. ## Gaps Found - `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/README.md` has no mention of `@@clientOption` support, no pointer to `docs/client-options.md`, and no mention of the `Get-ResourceHierarchy.ps1` utility script - `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/docs/index.mdx` links to `emitter.md` but does not link to the new `client-options.md`, leaving the `@@clientOption` reference effectively orphaned - Neither the `resource-name-constraint` nor the `resource-rbac-roles` client options are discoverable from the main README entry point - The `Get-ResourceHierarchy.ps1` script and its `.md` exist only in `eng/scripts/` with no cross-reference from any higher-level docs
üìê Implementation Guide This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above. ### Step 1: Modify files #### File 1: `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/docs/index.mdx` **Edit** ‚Äî add a link to `client-options.md` after the existing `[See documentation](./emitter.md)` line: ```mdx ## Emitter usage [See documentation](./emitter.md) ## Customizing code generation with `@@clientOption` [See documentation](./client-options.md) ``` #### File 2: `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/README.md` **Edit** ‚Äî add two new sections after the existing emitter options block: ````markdown ## Customizing code generation with `@@clientOption` The emitter supports several [`@@clientOption`](https://azure.github.io/typespec-azure/docs/libraries/typespec-client-generator-core/reference/decorators/#@clientOption) decorator keys scoped to `"csharp"` that allow spec authors to provide additional metadata for resource code generation. See [Supported @@clientOption Keys](./docs/client-options.md) for the full reference, including: - **`resource-rbac-roles`** ‚Äî defines RBAC role definitions used by the provisioning generator to emit `BuiltInRole` structs - **`resource-name-constraint`** ‚Äî overrides min/max length and pattern constraints for resource names in generated provisioning code ## Utility scripts ### `Get-ResourceHierarchy.ps1` A reflection-based analyzer that extracts the resource hierarchy from a compiled `Azure.ResourceManager..dll` and outputs the result as JSON. Useful for validating resource hierarchies during management-plane SDK migrations and during design review. ```powershell pwsh eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/eng/scripts/Get-ResourceHierarchy.ps1 > hierarchy.json ``` See [Get-ResourceHierarchy documentation](./eng/scripts/Get-ResourceHierarchy.md) for full usage, output schema, and caveats. ```` ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets No new test-backed snippets are needed for this change ‚Äî the implementation guide refers only to static documentation updates with TypeSpec and PowerShell code blocks that do not require snippet extraction. ### Step 3: Verify README structure The `README.md` at `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/README.md` is a developer-tooling README (not a client library README), so the full client library section template does not apply. After the changes in Step 1, the README should at minimum contain: 1. **Install** ‚Äî already present ‚úÖ 2. **Emitter usage** ‚Äî already present ‚úÖ 3. **Emitter options** ‚Äî already present ‚úÖ 4. **Customizing code generation with `@@clientOption`** ‚Äî **missing**, add per Step 1 above 5. **Utility scripts** ‚Äî **missing**, add per Step 1 above ### Step 4: Validate Run these commands in order: 1. `dotnet build eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/` (if applicable ‚Äî the emitter itself is TypeScript/npm) 2. Verify Markdown renders correctly by reviewing the diff for `README.md` and `docs/index.mdx` 3. No `Update-Snippets.ps1` or `Export-API.ps1` runs are needed for this change
## Next Steps > [!TIP] > **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **@copilot** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above
title: [Mgmt Generator] Docs: link new client-options and Get-ResourceHierarchy docs from README and docs index
